title: Weekly SAP AI Digest — Week of March 14, 2026
summary: This week in SAP AI: Next‑Gen SAP Ariba Is Here, Announcing the 2026 SAP Partner Awards – Global Winners, SAP Distributed Energy Resources Enables the Energy Flexibility Market and more. Full roundup of Joule, AI Core, Generative AI Hub, and SAP Business AI updates.

title: Next‑Gen SAP Ariba Is Here: Building the Foundation for Intelligent Procurement
summary: SAP has launched the next-gen SAP Ariba, an AI-driven procurement platform. This upgrade aims to revolutionize the source-to-pay process.

title: Announcing the 2026 SAP Partner Awards – Global Winners
summary: SAP has announced the 2026 Partner Awards, recognizing top-performing partners. The awards honor partners that have excelled in helping customers achieve their goals.

title: SAP Distributed Energy Resources Enables the Energy Flexibility Market
summary:
SAP introduces Distributed Energy Resources to facilitate energy flexibility market. 
This matters because it enables utilities to unlock data orchestration, crucial for harnessing distributed energy resources' value.

title: Strengthening Customer Experience Across the Lead-to-Cash Journey
summary: Companies are integrating customer experience into the lead-to-cash journey to boost efficiency. This matters because it drives operational precision and customer satisfaction.
